nodes.itemHTML: • Megabit.Blazorisestars2.5k - Blazorise is a component library built on top of Blazor and CSS frameworks like Bootstrap, Bulma and Material. Very easy to use.
• Visual Studio Code: pico8-lsstars20 - PICO-8 Language Server, providing full language support for the PICO-8 dialect of Lua.
• k6-html-reporterstars17 - Tool for generating k6 HTML reports.
• Hatica - Engineering Analytics to boost developer productivity © SaaS

• OSM2World - OSM2World is a converter that creates three-dimensional models of the world from OpenStreetMap data. It can be used as a stand-alone tool, on a server or as a library in Java programs. (Source Codestars423 / Wiki)
• Alfred Workflow (for Dart)stars4 - Dart library for writing Alfred workflows. Inspired by Alfred-Workflowstars2.8k for Python.
• Quaminastars276 - Fast pattern-matching for filtering messages and events.
• ivabusstars2 - Inspired by the GitHub Codespaces prompt. Includes decorators for git status, username and current directory.
• gugulenokstars0 - Has both a dark and a light mode. Includes decorators for git status, time and current directory.
• Gitmojistars9 - Search for Gitmojis easily.

• ⭐ASDF - Another System Definition Facility; a build system for Common Lisp. Expat. Quicklisp (see library manager) uses ASDF under the hood.
    • known ASDF extensions, such as asdf-system-connections, that lets you specify systems that are automatically loaded when two other systems are loaded, to connect them.
• ⭐ Ironcladstars129 - A library of crypto functions for Common Lisp. Not considered secure, but is still useful for the message digest functions. Expat.
• ⭐ clsql - An SQL database with a Common Lisp interface. LLGPL.
• ⭐ postmodern - A library for interacting with PostgreSQL. zlib.
• ⭐ CFFIstars361 - Portable, easy-to-use C foreign function interface. Expat.
• ⭐ Sketchstars1.2k - A CL framework for the creation of electronic art, graphics, and lots more. MIT.
• ⭐ CommonQtstars109 - A Common Lisp binding for Qt4 via QtSmoke. FreeBSD.

• ⭐ ltk - A binding for the Tk toolkit. LLGPL or GNU LGPL2.1.
    • LTk Examples - Provides LTk examples for the tkdocs tutorial.
    • LTk Plotchart - A wrapper around the tklib/plotchart library to work with LTk. This includes over 20 different chart types (xy-plots, gantt charts, 3d-bar charts etc...).
    • nodgui - Bindings for the Tk toolkit, based on Ltk, with syntax sugar and additional widgets. LLGPL.

• ⭐ SBCL - Steel Bank Common Lisp. A fork of CMUCL; compiles to machine code. Standard compliance. Public domain, with some parts under Expat and 3-clause BSD.
    • see also: sbcl-librarianstars55 - Dynamic library delivery tools for SBCL. Create shared libraries that can be called from C or Python. MIT. Blog post. Full example.
• ⭐ CCL - Clozure Common Lisp; compiler-only implementation, generates native code. LLGPL.
• ⭐ alexandria - A general-purpose utility library. Public domain.
• ⭐ triviastars261 - Optimized pattern-matching library. LLGPL.
• ⭐ closer-mop - A compatibility layer that rectifies many absent or incorrect MOP features. Expat.
• ⭐ iterate - An iteration construct for Common Lisp which is extensible and Lispier. MIT.
• ⭐ Quicklisp - A library manager containing many libraries, with easy depencency management. Expat.
• ⭐ Hunchentoot - A web server. 2-clause BSD
• ⭐ cl-who - The venerable HTML generator. FreeBSD.

• ⭐ Djulastars125 - A port of Django's template engine to Common Lisp. Expat.
    • cl-djula-tailwindstars6 - use TailwindCSS classe in your Djula templates without any JavaScript or Node.js tooling.

• ⭐ Parenscript - A translator from Common Lisp to Javascript. 3-clause BSD. See Trident-modestars64, an Emacs mode that provides live interaction with the browser.unlicence.
    • paren6stars18 - a set of ES6 macros for Parenscript.
• ⭐ BordeauxThreads - Portable, shared-state concurrency. Expat.
• ⭐ lparallelstars220 - A library for parallel programming. 3-clause BSD.
• ⭐ cl-ppcre - Portable, Perl-compatible regular expressions. FreeBSD.
• ⭐ Slimestars1.7k - Superior Lisp Interaction Mode for Emacs; a full-blown environment for Common Lisp inside of Emacs. Public domain.
• ⭐ esrapstars58 - Packrat parser. Expat.
• ⭐ FiveAMstars162 - Simple regression testing framework. FreeBSD.
• ⭐ cl-csvstars103 - A library for parsing CSV files. 3-clause BSD.
• ⭐ local-time - A development library for manipulating date and time information in a semi-standard manner. 3-clause BSD.
• ⭐ uiop and its pathname package (replaces cl-fad). uiop is part of ASDF3 and as thus is shipped in many implementations. MIT.

• ⭐ log4clstars61 - Logging framework modelled after Log4J. Apache2.0. Advanced integration with Slime.
    • log4cl-jsonstars2 - JSON appender extension. BSD.
• clachestars9 - General caching facility. Cache any Lisp object on disk or in memory. A cache can be persistent or have an expiration time. LLGPL.
• literate-lispstars42 - Load Common Lisp code blocks from Emacs' Org files. MIT.
• eruditestars55 - Literate Programming System built with interactive development in mind. MIT.
• GQLite iOS SDK - GQLite iOS SDK is a toolkit to work with GraphQL servers easily.
• smjonas/inc-rename.nvimstars199 - Provides an incremental LSP rename command based on Neovim's command-preview feature.
• imbacraft/dusk.nvimstars10 - Dusk is a lightweight, aesthetically minimal Neovim config, written in Lua, able to provide for web and Java development.
• 2022stars58
• aws-firewall-factorystars74 - Deploy, update, and stage your WAFs while managing them centrally via FMS.
• aws-firewall-factorystars72 - Deploy, update, and stage your WAFs while managing them centrally via FMS.
• cdk-organizationsstars63 - CDK constructs that helps to provision AWS Organization, Organizational Units (OU), Accounts and Policies.
• cdk-organizationsstars51 - CDK constructs that helps to provision AWS Organization, Organizational Units (OU), Accounts and Policies.
• crow-apistars6 - Create a serverless API with routes based on your file structure.
• crow-apistars5 - Create a serverless API with routes based on your file structure.
• Harfang 3Dstars202 3D visualization library usable in C++, Python, Lua and Go. Based on BGFX. [GPLv3/LGPLv3/Commercial] website

• Argonaut - Deploy apps and infrastructure on your cloud in minutes. Support for custom and third-party app deployments on Kubernetes and Lambda environments. Free tier allows unlimited apps and deployments for 5 environments and 2 users.

• Eva Tardos & et.al. Algorithmic Game Theory - Basic chapters on algorithmic methods for equilibria, mechanism design and combinatorial auctions are followed by chapters on important game theory applications such as incentives and pricing, cost sharing, information markets and cryptography and security.
